title: Low Profile PvP
description: Low Profile PvP a pack that adds low shield low fire no totem pop animations for clear view
body:
****Low Profile PvP is a standalone Minecraft resource pack made specifically for PvP players who want to keep their screen clean, their view clear, and their reaction time sharp.**

This pack makes small but powerful visual changes to help you stay focused in the heat of battle — without messing with the rest of the game’s look.

**🔧 What It Changes:**


🔻 Lowered Shield – no more bulky shield blocking your view during fights

🔥 Low Fire – toned-down fire that won’t blind you when you’re on fire

❌ No Totem Animation – disables the distracting totem pop-up


**⚔️ Why Use Low Profile PvP?**


Focus purely on PvP combat with no extra distractions

Doesn’t touch blocks, items, or UI – so it’s fully compatible with other packs

Great for 1v1s, Bedwars, UHC, Skywars, Practice Servers, and more

Lightweight and optimized — runs smooth on low-end setups

**📦 Standalone & Stackable**


This is a standalone pack, so it only changes what’s listed above. Want to combine it with Bare Bones, FullBright, or another PvP GUI pack? No problem. Just drag it to the top of your pack order.



Made with love for PvPers by phonextox7
Simple, sharp, and sweat-ready.**
